pages.raw_text:
The brewery workmen will use
every means at their disposal to
secure concessions from the
American Federation of Labor at
the coming meeting. The execll-
tive committee of the federation
ruled some time ago that the
Brewery Workers union must
cease to claim and EXCISE jurisdic.
ton over firemen and teamsters
employed by the breweries Of the
country. Upon refusal the fedora
ton revoked the cnarter of the
brewers and refused to recognize
the utilization of the union with the
national organization.


The brewery workmen have ap-
pealed to the unions affiliated with
the A. F. of l.. against the ruling
of the executive board and have in
a great number of instances re-
ceived assurances of support. The
brewers claim a prior right to jur-
isdiction over teamsters and engi-
neers employed by the brewing
companies. owing to the fact that
they organized these men years be-
fore any attempt was made to do
so on the part of the American
Federation of Labor.
